learning_outcomes.statement: Analyze the basic principles of supply and demand to determine market equilibrium.
learning_outcomes.notes: Focus on first-year level understanding of market forces.

learning_outcomes.statement: Calculate opportunity costs in simple economic decision scenarios.
learning_outcomes.notes: Use numerical examples to demonstrate calculation.

learning_outcomes.statement: Interpret graphical representations of supply and demand curves to predict changes in market conditions.
learning_outcomes.notes: Emphasize reading and explaining shifts and movements.

alignment_notes: Outcomes focus on foundational economics concepts suitable for a first-year workshop.
